biography: Riku, the esteemed brother of Panu, made a solitary but notable appearance at the Hector Trophée, a unique foray into this prestigious pair competition. His participation marks him as a part of the tournament's history, even if brief, connecting him to the familial legacy within the event.

During his single outing, Riku approached the greens with a quiet determination, demonstrating the competitive spirit inherent to the tournament's field. Despite his earnest efforts, neither the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing nor the prestigious individual Victor Trophy was secured, underscoring the rigorous challenge presented by this elite event.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Riku will not be among the competitors gracing the fairways, having concluded his active involvement and now considered retired from Hector events. His singular presence, nonetheless, leaves a lasting impression, symbolizing a brief yet significant chapter in the tournament's storied past.
